news_items.headline: Seasonal Tailwinds Are Aligning for 30 & 10-Year Treasuries – Here's the Setup
news_items.summary: There's a historically bullish seasonal window for longer-dated interest rates from now through early August. Lower liquidity in summer often leads to a "search for yield," big coupon reinvestment flows in June/July, and the classic "Sell in May" rotation into safer assets, which tends to support Treasuries. Add in softer summer economic data, and you've got a setup that has favored duration for years. Not guaranteed, but the pattern is lining up again.
